word: H4956 - מִשְׂרְפֹות מַיִם - Misrᵉphôwth mayim - mis-ref-ohth' mah'-yim - Misrephoth-mayim

sections.paragraph:
Original: משׂרפות מים

Transliteration: miśrephôth mayim

Phonetic: mis-ref-ohth' mah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Misrephoth-maim = "burnings of water"
  1. a place in northern Palestine near Sidon

Origin: from pl of H4955 and H4325

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
